-O0 -g3 -g -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T "C:/Users/LENOVO/Desktop/RM/work/omni_wheel - self/STM32F407IGHx_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=omni_wheel.map
